mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, AUTHORITY, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, AUTHORITY,MEMBER_DEL_FL, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID FROM "MEMBER"
